{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032121271468769551962CEB46E314"}"},"total":2119},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7186580264871592736","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这小说不管是在女主和其他的方面三关非常正。主角不屑于用系统给他的技能去博的女主的欢心。而且不会用不劳而获的技能去打脸别人数年的努力."},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1673256210,"group_id":"7065672900719676457","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"因为我磕的cp糖太少了所以我只能成为太太了，自己造粮丰衣足食","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw+jXMHsnpfb/FZCfOGLRq5KGIpKiCugbJkAqgiTU2Za","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cfd3d5a309f541f5b2ff80dd7b905f14~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776614505&x-signature=hC23EsP%2B1KpSAB5CSa1D89RmgOk%3D","user_id":"3513641908317044","user_name":"大猛t就是我啦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3513641908317044","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7065672900719676457","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越到书中，被迫以反派的身份逆袭的穆云柯，然而第一次攻略却以惨败收场。惨败的原因，是他居然真的爱上了第一女主安瑾瑶。
于是在开启第二次攻略之前，穆云柯决定抹除自己对安瑾瑶所有的感情。
可令穆云柯万万没想到的是，第一女主安瑾瑶竟然也重生了。而重生之后的安瑾瑶，决心用自己的一切去弥补上一世自己辜负的这个男人。
